section1.descriptionPoste: I design high-performance, user-friendly applications tailored to real needs – from wireframes to deployment.

section2.description1: I build efficient and customized applications to meet the needs of every project.
section2.description2: Passionate about cybersecurity, I apply secure development practices to create robust and secure applications.
section2.description3: I design unique and memorable logos that reflect the identity and values of a project or brand.

section3.projet1: JOB OFFERS AND CANDIDATE MANAGEMENT APPLICATION.
section3.projet2: INTUITIVE LEAVE MANAGEMENT APPLICATION FOR EMPLOYEES.
section3.projet5: MOBILE APPLICATION FOR CHOIR SHEET MUSIC MANAGEMENT
section3.logo1: The logo for Chorale Archange Tsaramandroso, on a royal blue background (symbolizing gendarmerie and spirituality), features a wooden stage. A red music note and golden wings represent purity and elevation. It unites faith, music, and commitment.
section3.logo2: The logo for Antsa Fiderana Ambohidreny, on a white background, is encircled by the choir’s name. In the center, the stylized letters “AFA” in red, merged with a music note, symbolize praise and harmony. Musical staves in the background reinforce the musical theme. A Bible quote in Malagasy grounds the choir in faith.
section3.logo3: The Hainkintana logo for its 10th anniversary – an unselected contest proposal – features a stylized "10" on a starry background: a telescope forms the "1", and Earth represents the "0". The words "Hainkintana" and "Astronomy Association" are included. This design evokes astronomy, discovery, and celebration of the decade.
section3.logo4: The "Clash mode" logo, for an online sales page, is a black circle with a gold border. It features a shopping bag symbolizing shopping. The name "Clash" (derived from the seller's name) and "mode" evoke dynamic, trendy, and accessible fashion.
section3.logo5: The AE logo is inspired by my initials, Alex Emilien. Its clean, slanted lines reflect my personality: dynamic, creative, and forward-thinking. It represents my visual identity as a developer and designer.

section6.c1: Web Writing – Orange Digital Center, Fianarantsoa
section6.c2: Participation in a Logo Design Contest – Hainkintana Association
